title: Daily Temperatures
description:
Given an array of daily temperatures, return an array where each element tells you how many days you have to wait until a warmer temperature. If no warmer day exists, put `0`.

**Example:**
```
temperatures = [73, 74, 75, 71, 69, 72, 76, 73]
Result = [1, 1, 4, 2, 1, 1, 0, 0]
```
hints: The brute-force checks every future day for each day — O(n²). A stack can do this in O(n).
Use a stack to track indices of days whose answer you haven't found yet. Process left to right.
When the current temperature is warmer than the top of the stack, pop and calculate the difference in indices.
